rulings.Case Title: ALLYSYN OVERTON VS. PATRICK LAKE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 4, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF ALLYSYN OVERTON's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to September 3, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide a courtesy copy of the operative Cross-Complaint to Department 501 no later than August 8, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
